basic_details.job_title: NEIAFMR – Professor, Senior Assistant and More – 35 Posts
basic_details.short_information: NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026 is now open for 35 vacancies of Professor (Ayurveda)- 1 post, Associate Professor (Ayurveda)- 14 posts, Assistant Professor (Ayurveda)- 2 posts and other posts for qualification as per post, with applications accepted offline from 30 April 2026 to 08 June 2026 through the official website www.neiafmr.org.in.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 45 days from the date of publication of advertisement- 08 June 2026

age_limit.age_details: 55 years for Direct Recruitment, 56 years for Deputation

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate, MBBS, MD, MS, M.Sc, M.pharma

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIAFMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 35 Professor, Senior Assistant and More Posts
